records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... going to guard the Solar Gate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... going to guard the Solar Gate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm... going to guard the Solar Gate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It is an honorable task to guard the sanctuary that is the heart of Elysion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It is an honorable task to guard the sanctuary that is the heart of Elysion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It is an honorable task to guard the sanctuary that is the heart of Elysion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once you fulfill your time as the guard of the Solar Gate, you will officially become a paladin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once you fulfill your time as the guard of the Solar Gate, you will officially become a paladin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once you fulfill your time as the guard of the Solar Gate, you will officially become a paladin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's like I'm dreaming. I can finally become a paladin like Her Eminence...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's like I'm dreaming. I can finally become a paladin like Her Eminence...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's like I'm dreaming. I can finally become a paladin like Her Eminence...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for this opportunity, sir!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for this opportunity, sir!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for this opportunity, sir!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no need to thank me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no need to thank me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no need to thank me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This was a special request from Her Eminence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This was a special request from Her Eminence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This was a special request from Her Eminence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... really?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... really?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... really?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we all worked so hard... Will it be okay for me to be the only one with these kinds of privileges?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we all worked so hard... Will it be okay for me to be the only one with these kinds of privileges?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we all worked so hard... Will it be okay for me to be the only one with these kinds of privileges?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you wish to refuse this position out of fairness, I will not stop you, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you wish to refuse this position out of fairness, I will not stop you, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you wish to refuse this position out of fairness, I will not stop you, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? No! Of course I wouldn't!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? No! Of course I wouldn't!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? No! Of course I wouldn't!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry for talking nonsense!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry for talking nonsense!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry for talking nonsense!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, no worries. Everyone recognizes your outstanding skills.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, no worries. Everyone recognizes your outstanding skills.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, no worries. Everyone recognizes your outstanding skills.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You will become a great paladin one day, and the only thing that has changed is that your time has come a little earlier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You will become a great paladin one day, and the only thing that has changed is that your time has come a little earlier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You will become a great paladin one day, and the only thing that has changed is that your time has come a little earlier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A little earlier?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A little earlier?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A little earlier?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The plague of the gelid lands is getting worse day by day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The plague of the gelid lands is getting worse day by day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The plague of the gelid lands is getting worse day by day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The cardinals' concerns have grown larger and they wish to eliminate the Demon Lord as fast as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The cardinals' concerns have grown larger and they wish to eliminate the Demon Lord as fast as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The cardinals' concerns have grown larger and they wish to eliminate the Demon Lord as fast as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her Eminence seems to want your help in defeating the Demon Lord, Sister Mordred.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her Eminence seems to want your help in defeating the Demon Lord, Sister Mordred.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her Eminence seems to want your help in defeating the Demon Lord, Sister Mordred.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Her Eminence... wants me...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Her Eminence... wants me...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Her Eminence... wants me...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In a week, you will begin your first shift as the guard of the Solar Gate after the guard changing ceremony.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In a week, you will begin your first shift as the guard of the Solar Gate after the guard changing ceremony.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In a week, you will begin your first shift as the guard of the Solar Gate after the guard changing ceremony.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until then, I suggest you behave yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until then, I suggest you behave yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until then, I suggest you behave yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll keep that in mind, sir.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll keep that in mind, sir.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll keep that in mind, sir.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would it be okay for me to tour the Solar Gate before the ceremony?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would it be okay for me to tour the Solar Gate before the ceremony?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would it be okay for me to tour the Solar Gate before the ceremony?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I shall be your guide. I am certain it will be a good experience for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I shall be your guide. I am certain it will be a good experience for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I shall be your guide. I am certain it will be a good experience for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Thank you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Thank you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Thank you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's so tall.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's so tall.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's so tall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't notice because of the snowstorm, but this city must've been pretty big.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't notice because of the snowstorm, but this city must've been pretty big.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't notice because of the snowstorm, but this city must've been pretty big.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait! You're not thinking of going in there, are you? What if there are monsters hiding inside?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait! You're not thinking of going in there, are you? What if there are monsters hiding inside?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait! You're not thinking of going in there, are you? What if there are monsters hiding inside?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa. It's so dark in here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa. It's so dark in here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa. It's so dark in here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's so spacious, but there aren't any windows. I wonder what this place was used for.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's so spacious, but there aren't any windows. I wonder what this place was used for.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's so spacious, but there aren't any windows. I wonder what this place was used for.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't see a thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't see a thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't see a thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Of course, you can't see anything because it's this dark
8g

Of course, you can't see anything because it's this dark

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lugh? Why are you suddenly sitting down?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lugh? Why are you suddenly sitting down?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lugh? Why are you suddenly sitting down?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did your legs give out from all that running earlier?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did your legs give out from all that running earlier?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did your legs give out from all that running earlier?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's because I can't see... the Golden Branch that is supposed to be inside the Solar Gate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's because I can't see... the Golden Branch that is supposed to be inside the Solar Gate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's because I can't see... the Golden Branch that is supposed to be inside the Solar Gate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solar Gate...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solar Gate...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solar Gate...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know what this place is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know what this place is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know what this place is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I felt strangely familiar... with the way here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I felt strangely familiar... with the way here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I felt strangely familiar... with the way here.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I think this place is

I think this place is

I think this place is

records.m_Talk_ENG: Elysion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Elysion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Elysion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said that you're from Elysion. It wasn't in ruins when you left, was it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said that you're from Elysion. It wasn't in ruins when you left, was it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said that you're from Elysion. It wasn't in ruins when you left, was it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Elysion was a prosperous country.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Elysion was a prosperous country.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Elysion was a prosperous country.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a safe place from the gelid lands' snow because the light of the Solar Gate protected us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a safe place from the gelid lands' snow because the light of the Solar Gate protected us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a safe place from the gelid lands' snow because the light of the Solar Gate protected us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But here... It's all covered in snow and there are no traces of humans.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But here... It's all covered in snow and there are no traces of humans.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But here... It's all covered in snow and there are no traces of humans.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe you're confusing it with someplace similar?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe you're confusing it with someplace similar?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe you're confusing it with someplace similar?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the badge that you found. It's with no doubt the paladin symbol of the pilgrimage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the badge that you found. It's with no doubt the paladin symbol of the pilgrimage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the badge that you found. It's with no doubt the paladin symbol of the pilgrimage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hoped it was all just a coincidence, but... now, I can't even deny it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hoped it was all just a coincidence, but... now, I can't even deny it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hoped it was all just a coincidence, but... now, I can't even deny it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this not astounding?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this not astounding?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this not astounding?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Overnight, a country collapsed into snow-covered ruins.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Overnight, a country collapsed into snow-covered ruins.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Overnight, a country collapsed into snow-covered ruins.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like the day when Avalon fell... in vain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like the day when Avalon fell... in vain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like the day when Avalon fell... in vain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The devil...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The devil...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The devil...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, my. Trigger-happy, much?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, my. Trigger-happy, much?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, my. Trigger-happy, much?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Markswoman. You must get in the habit of having some foresight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Markswoman. You must get in the habit of having some foresight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Markswoman. You must get in the habit of having some foresight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: DIE!
records.m_Talk_DEU: DIE!
records.m_Talk_FRA: DIE!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I never expected much grace from you, pointy-haired kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I never expected much grace from you, pointy-haired kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I never expected much grace from you, pointy-haired kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you calling pointy?! Pumpkin head!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you calling pointy?! Pumpkin head!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you calling pointy?! Pumpkin head!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How... are you even here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How... are you even here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How... are you even here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I exist everywhere. With my only limitation being a contract.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I exist everywhere. With my only limitation being a contract.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I exist everywhere. With my only limitation being a contract.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Demon Lord wanted me here, so here I am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Demon Lord wanted me here, so here I am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Demon Lord wanted me here, so here I am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Demon Lord sent you here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Demon Lord sent you here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Demon Lord sent you here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! Even the Demon Lord knew we were coming?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! Even the Demon Lord knew we were coming?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! Even the Demon Lord knew we were coming?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, the Demon Lord is focusing on recovering her wounds. She has no time to spare for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, the Demon Lord is focusing on recovering her wounds. She has no time to spare for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, the Demon Lord is focusing on recovering her wounds. She has no time to spare for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was merely ordered to watch over a sinner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was merely ordered to watch over a sinner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was merely ordered to watch over a sinner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By sinner, you mean...
records.m_Talk_DEU: By sinner, you mean...
records.m_Talk_FRA: By sinner, you mean...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...the black armor?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...the black armor?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...the black armor?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But unfortunately for me, you seemed to have let her free before I could do anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But unfortunately for me, you seemed to have let her free before I could do anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But unfortunately for me, you seemed to have let her free before I could do anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Demon Lord will be furious if she finds out about this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Demon Lord will be furious if she finds out about this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Demon Lord will be furious if she finds out about this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watching over her when you tied her up so loosely?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watching over her when you tied her up so loosely?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watching over her when you tied her up so loosely?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Guess there's nothing to being a devil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Guess there's nothing to being a devil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Guess there's nothing to being a devil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you're here to get revenge on us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you're here to get revenge on us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you're here to get revenge on us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I will not waste any more of my minions trying to kill you both.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I will not waste any more of my minions trying to kill you both.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I will not waste any more of my minions trying to kill you both.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At least for now...
records.m_Talk_DEU: At least for now...
records.m_Talk_FRA: At least for now...

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This will be our last farewell, I suppose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This will be our last farewell, I suppose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This will be our last farewell, I suppose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you're up to this time, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you're up to this time, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you're up to this time, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: you're never going to have your way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: you're never going to have your way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: you're never going to have your way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That dagger...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That dagger...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That dagger...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grab my hand, Morgana!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grab my hand, Morgana!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grab my hand, Morgana!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Bye, you stupid devil!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Bye, you stupid devil!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Bye, you stupid devil!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A space-jumping incantation involving blood and ritual equipment...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A space-jumping incantation involving blood and ritual equipment...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A space-jumping incantation involving blood and ritual equipment...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So it seems that she is still alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So it seems that she is still alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So it seems that she is still alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No.

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Alive" might not be the proper term for her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Alive" might not be the proper term for her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Alive" might not be the proper term for her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There you are, Marquis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There you are, Marquis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There you are, Marquis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sollicitatio.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sollicitatio.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sollicitatio.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did the Demon Lord send you for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did the Demon Lord send you for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did the Demon Lord send you for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I allow you to speak?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I allow you to speak?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I allow you to speak?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see the sinner who was being punished has disappeared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see the sinner who was being punished has disappeared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see the sinner who was being punished has disappeared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you could handle something as simple as being a prison guard, but perhaps my sister had too high expectations for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you could handle something as simple as being a prison guard, but perhaps my sister had too high expectations for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you could handle something as simple as being a prison guard, but perhaps my sister had too high expectations for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All that a houseguarding ghost can do is flap tablecloths and throw forks at intruders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All that a houseguarding ghost can do is flap tablecloths and throw forks at intruders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All that a houseguarding ghost can do is flap tablecloths and throw forks at intruders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By saying that you could not intervene... Did humans set foot in this place?
records.m_Talk_DEU: By saying that you could not intervene... Did humans set foot in this place?
records.m_Talk_FRA: By saying that you could not intervene... Did humans set foot in this place?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She was a Helgon with a Stigmata.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She was a Helgon with a Stigmata.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She was a Helgon with a Stigmata.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So it seems that possibilities still exist in this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So it seems that possibilities still exist in this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So it seems that possibilities still exist in this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How wonderful. One can find its root by tracing it back from the branch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How wonderful. One can find its root by tracing it back from the branch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How wonderful. One can find its root by tracing it back from the branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Follow the traces of the humans who visited here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Follow the traces of the humans who visited here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Follow the traces of the humans who visited here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And make sure there are no survivors.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And make sure there are no survivors.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And make sure there are no survivors.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This world regards the Demon Lord as its enemy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This world regards the Demon Lord as its enemy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This world regards the Demon Lord as its enemy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we threaten the existence of humanity, a formidable Antagonist to the Demon Lord will be awakened.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we threaten the existence of humanity, a formidable Antagonist to the Demon Lord will be awakened.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we threaten the existence of humanity, a formidable Antagonist to the Demon Lord will be awakened.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is of no concern.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is of no concern.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is of no concern.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My sister has almost fully recovered her strength, so no amount of resistance in the world will be able to stop the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My sister has almost fully recovered her strength, so no amount of resistance in the world will be able to stop the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My sister has almost fully recovered her strength, so no amount of resistance in the world will be able to stop the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The end...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The end...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The end...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was under the assumption that the Demon Lord wanted to stay here with you forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was under the assumption that the Demon Lord wanted to stay here with you forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was under the assumption that the Demon Lord wanted to stay here with you forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That is no matter what a parasite that lives off of human souls should be concerned about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That is no matter what a parasite that lives off of human souls should be concerned about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That is no matter what a parasite that lives off of human souls should be concerned about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are to willingly carry out the orders of the queen's will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are to willingly carry out the orders of the queen's will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are to willingly carry out the orders of the queen's will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you command, I shall find the remaining shelters of the humans and destroy them all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you command, I shall find the remaining shelters of the humans and destroy them all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you command, I shall find the remaining shelters of the humans and destroy them all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm... going to guard the Solar Gate?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm... going to guard the Solar Gate?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm... going to guard the Solar Gate?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It is an honorable task to guard the sanctuary that is the heart of Elysion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It is an honorable task to guard the sanctuary that is the heart of Elysion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It is an honorable task to guard the sanctuary that is the heart of Elysion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once you fulfill your time as the guard of the Solar Gate, you will officially become a paladin.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once you fulfill your time as the guard of the Solar Gate, you will officially become a paladin.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once you fulfill your time as the guard of the Solar Gate, you will officially become a paladin.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's like I'm dreaming. I can finally become a paladin like Her Eminence...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's like I'm dreaming. I can finally become a paladin like Her Eminence...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's like I'm dreaming. I can finally become a paladin like Her Eminence...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for this opportunity, sir!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for this opportunity, sir!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for this opportunity, sir!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is no need to thank me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is no need to thank me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is no need to thank me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This was a special request from Her Eminence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This was a special request from Her Eminence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This was a special request from Her Eminence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... really?!

root.m_Talk_FRA: But we all worked so hard... Will it be okay for me to be the only one with these kinds of privileges?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you wish to refuse this position out of fairness, I will not stop you, but...

root.m_Talk_FRA: If you wish to refuse this position out of fairness, I will not stop you, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? No! Of course I wouldn't!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? No! Of course I wouldn't!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry for talking nonsense!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry for talking nonsense!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry for talking nonsense!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, no worries. Everyone recognizes your outstanding skills.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, no worries. Everyone recognizes your outstanding skills.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You will become a great paladin one day, and the only thing that has changed is that your time has come a little earlier.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You will become a great paladin one day, and the only thing that has changed is that your time has come a little earlier.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The plague of the gelid lands is getting worse day by day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The plague of the gelid lands is getting worse day by day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The plague of the gelid lands is getting worse day by day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The cardinals' concerns have grown larger and they wish to eliminate the Demon Lord as fast as possible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The cardinals' concerns have grown larger and they wish to eliminate the Demon Lord as fast as possible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The cardinals' concerns have grown larger and they wish to eliminate the Demon Lord as fast as possible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Her Eminence seems to want your help in defeating the Demon Lord, Sister Mordred.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Her Eminence seems to want your help in defeating the Demon Lord, Sister Mordred.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Her Eminence seems to want your help in defeating the Demon Lord, Sister Mordred.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Her Eminence... wants me...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In a week, you will begin your first shift as the guard of the Solar Gate after the guard changing ceremony.

root.m_Talk_FRA: In a week, you will begin your first shift as the guard of the Solar Gate after the guard changing ceremony.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Until then, I suggest you behave yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll keep that in mind, sir.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll keep that in mind, sir.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Would it be okay for me to tour the Solar Gate before the ceremony?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Would it be okay for me to tour the Solar Gate before the ceremony?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Would it be okay for me to tour the Solar Gate before the ceremony?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I shall be your guide. I am certain it will be a good experience for you.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I shall be your guide. I am certain it will be a good experience for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Thank you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Thank you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Thank you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's so tall.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's so tall.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's so tall.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't notice because of the snowstorm, but this city must've been pretty big.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't notice because of the snowstorm, but this city must've been pretty big.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't notice because of the snowstorm, but this city must've been pretty big.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait! You're not thinking of going in there, are you? What if there are monsters hiding inside?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait! You're not thinking of going in there, are you? What if there are monsters hiding inside?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait! You're not thinking of going in there, are you? What if there are monsters hiding inside?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa. It's so dark in here.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa. It's so dark in here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's so spacious, but there aren't any windows. I wonder what this place was used for.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did your legs give out from all that running earlier?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did your legs give out from all that running earlier?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's because I can't see... the Golden Branch that is supposed to be inside the Solar Gate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.

I think this place is

root.m_Talk_ENG: Elysion.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Elysion.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Elysion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's impossible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's impossible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's impossible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You said that you're from Elysion. It wasn't in ruins when you left, was it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You said that you're from Elysion. It wasn't in ruins when you left, was it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You said that you're from Elysion. It wasn't in ruins when you left, was it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Elysion was a prosperous country.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Elysion was a prosperous country.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Elysion was a prosperous country.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a safe place from the gelid lands' snow because the light of the Solar Gate protected us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a safe place from the gelid lands' snow because the light of the Solar Gate protected us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a safe place from the gelid lands' snow because the light of the Solar Gate protected us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But here... It's all covered in snow and there are no traces of humans.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But here... It's all covered in snow and there are no traces of humans.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But here... It's all covered in snow and there are no traces of humans.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe you're confusing it with someplace similar?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe you're confusing it with someplace similar?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe you're confusing it with someplace similar?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the badge that you found. It's with no doubt the paladin symbol of the pilgrimage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the badge that you found. It's with no doubt the paladin symbol of the pilgrimage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the badge that you found. It's with no doubt the paladin symbol of the pilgrimage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hoped it was all just a coincidence, but... now, I can't even deny it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hoped it was all just a coincidence, but... now, I can't even deny it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hoped it was all just a coincidence, but... now, I can't even deny it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this not astounding?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this not astounding?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this not astounding?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Overnight, a country collapsed into snow-covered ruins.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Overnight, a country collapsed into snow-covered ruins.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Overnight, a country collapsed into snow-covered ruins.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like the day when Avalon fell... in vain.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just like the day when Avalon fell... in vain.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like the day when Avalon fell... in vain.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The devil...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The devil...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The devil...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, my. Trigger-happy, much?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, my. Trigger-happy, much?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, my. Trigger-happy, much?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Markswoman. You must get in the habit of having some foresight.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Markswoman. You must get in the habit of having some foresight.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Markswoman. You must get in the habit of having some foresight.

root.m_Talk_ENG: DIE!
root.m_Talk_DEU: DIE!
root.m_Talk_FRA: DIE!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I never expected much grace from you, pointy-haired kid.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I never expected much grace from you, pointy-haired kid.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I never expected much grace from you, pointy-haired kid.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who are you calling pointy?! Pumpkin head!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who are you calling pointy?! Pumpkin head!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who are you calling pointy?! Pumpkin head!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How... are you even here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How... are you even here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How... are you even here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I exist everywhere. With my only limitation being a contract.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I exist everywhere. With my only limitation being a contract.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I exist everywhere. With my only limitation being a contract.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Demon Lord wanted me here, so here I am.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Demon Lord wanted me here, so here I am.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Demon Lord wanted me here, so here I am.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Demon Lord sent you here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Demon Lord sent you here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Demon Lord sent you here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch! Even the Demon Lord knew we were coming?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch! Even the Demon Lord knew we were coming?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch! Even the Demon Lord knew we were coming?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, the Demon Lord is focusing on recovering her wounds. She has no time to spare for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, the Demon Lord is focusing on recovering her wounds. She has no time to spare for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, the Demon Lord is focusing on recovering her wounds. She has no time to spare for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was merely ordered to watch over a sinner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was merely ordered to watch over a sinner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was merely ordered to watch over a sinner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By sinner, you mean...
root.m_Talk_DEU: By sinner, you mean...
root.m_Talk_FRA: By sinner, you mean...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...the black armor?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...the black armor?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...the black armor?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But unfortunately for me, you seemed to have let her free before I could do anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But unfortunately for me, you seemed to have let her free before I could do anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But unfortunately for me, you seemed to have let her free before I could do anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Demon Lord will be furious if she finds out about this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Demon Lord will be furious if she finds out about this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Demon Lord will be furious if she finds out about this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Watching over her when you tied her up so loosely?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Watching over her when you tied her up so loosely?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Watching over her when you tied her up so loosely?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Guess there's nothing to being a devil.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Guess there's nothing to being a devil.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Guess there's nothing to being a devil.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, you're here to get revenge on us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, you're here to get revenge on us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, you're here to get revenge on us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I will not waste any more of my minions trying to kill you both.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I will not waste any more of my minions trying to kill you both.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I will not waste any more of my minions trying to kill you both.

root.m_Talk_ENG: At least for now...
root.m_Talk_DEU: At least for now...
root.m_Talk_FRA: At least for now...

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This will be our last farewell, I suppose.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This will be our last farewell, I suppose.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This will be our last farewell, I suppose.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you're up to this time, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you're up to this time, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you're up to this time, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: you're never going to have your way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: you're never going to have your way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: you're never going to have your way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That dagger...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That dagger...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That dagger...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Grab my hand, Morgana!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Grab my hand, Morgana!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Grab my hand, Morgana!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Bye, you stupid devil!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Bye, you stupid devil!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Bye, you stupid devil!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A space-jumping incantation involving blood and ritual equipment...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A space-jumping incantation involving blood and ritual equipment...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A space-jumping incantation involving blood and ritual equipment...

root.m_Talk_ENG: So it seems that she is still alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So it seems that she is still alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So it seems that she is still alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No.

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Alive" might not be the proper term for her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Alive" might not be the proper term for her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Alive" might not be the proper term for her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There you are, Marquis.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There you are, Marquis.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There you are, Marquis.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sollicitatio.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sollicitatio.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sollicitatio.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did the Demon Lord send you for me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did the Demon Lord send you for me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did the Demon Lord send you for me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did I allow you to speak?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did I allow you to speak?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did I allow you to speak?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see the sinner who was being punished has disappeared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see the sinner who was being punished has disappeared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see the sinner who was being punished has disappeared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought you could handle something as simple as being a prison guard, but perhaps my sister had too high expectations for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought you could handle something as simple as being a prison guard, but perhaps my sister had too high expectations for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought you could handle something as simple as being a prison guard, but perhaps my sister had too high expectations for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All that a houseguarding ghost can do is flap tablecloths and throw forks at intruders.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All that a houseguarding ghost can do is flap tablecloths and throw forks at intruders.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All that a houseguarding ghost can do is flap tablecloths and throw forks at intruders.

root.m_Talk_ENG: By saying that you could not intervene... Did humans set foot in this place?
root.m_Talk_DEU: By saying that you could not intervene... Did humans set foot in this place?
root.m_Talk_FRA: By saying that you could not intervene... Did humans set foot in this place?

root.m_Talk_ENG: She was a Helgon with a Stigmata.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She was a Helgon with a Stigmata.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She was a Helgon with a Stigmata.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So it seems that possibilities still exist in this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So it seems that possibilities still exist in this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So it seems that possibilities still exist in this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How wonderful. One can find its root by tracing it back from the branch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How wonderful. One can find its root by tracing it back from the branch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How wonderful. One can find its root by tracing it back from the branch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Follow the traces of the humans who visited here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Follow the traces of the humans who visited here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Follow the traces of the humans who visited here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And make sure there are no survivors.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And make sure there are no survivors.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And make sure there are no survivors.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This world regards the Demon Lord as its enemy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This world regards the Demon Lord as its enemy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This world regards the Demon Lord as its enemy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we threaten the existence of humanity, a formidable Antagonist to the Demon Lord will be awakened.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we threaten the existence of humanity, a formidable Antagonist to the Demon Lord will be awakened.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we threaten the existence of humanity, a formidable Antagonist to the Demon Lord will be awakened.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is of no concern.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is of no concern.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is of no concern.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My sister has almost fully recovered her strength, so no amount of resistance in the world will be able to stop the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My sister has almost fully recovered her strength, so no amount of resistance in the world will be able to stop the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My sister has almost fully recovered her strength, so no amount of resistance in the world will be able to stop the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The end...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The end...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The end...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I was under the assumption that the Demon Lord wanted to stay here with you forever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I was under the assumption that the Demon Lord wanted to stay here with you forever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I was under the assumption that the Demon Lord wanted to stay here with you forever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is no matter what a parasite that lives off of human souls should be concerned about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is no matter what a parasite that lives off of human souls should be concerned about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is no matter what a parasite that lives off of human souls should be concerned about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are to willingly carry out the orders of the queen's will.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are to willingly carry out the orders of the queen's will.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are to willingly carry out the orders of the queen's will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you command, I shall find the remaining shelters of the humans and destroy them all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you command, I shall find the remaining shelters of the humans and destroy them all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you command, I shall find the remaining shelters of the humans and destroy them all.
